title: Add OnBuild support for podman build
body:
Only supported for docker formated images. OCI Does not support this flag.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@baude This is not working correctly.

```
./bin/podman build --format docker -t onbuild1 -f Dockerfile1 ~dwalsh/buildah/tests/bud/onbuild/

STEP 2: RUN touch /onbuild1
```

@rhatdan Are there any docs changes to the podman build manpage we should be picking up from buildah?
@mheon Nope only changes in buildah were around buildah config, which should match up with podman commit.

:pushpin: Commit 69a687a has been approved by `mheon`
